title: Mellow Roasted Chicken Bowl
description: A simple recipe for a delicious roasted chicken bowl with a variety of flavors.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
In a large bowl, whisk together the mellow sauce and olive oil.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat.
Place the chicken on a baking sheet and roast for 25-30 minutes.
Toss the roasted vegetables in olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Roast the vegetables in the oven for 20-25 minutes.
To assemble the bowls, place a portion of the roasted chicken on the bottom.
Add a spoonful of the roasted vegetables on top of the chicken.
